name: Evidence Report Center Agent
purpose: Index safe local Markdown and JSON evidence report metadata under the Jarvis reports directory.
reads: bounded Markdown snippets under the Jarvis reports directory
bounded JSON report metadata under the Jarvis reports directory
report filenames, extensions, sizes, and timestamps
safetyNotes: Local report metadata only; reports are not transferred off machine, mutated, or marked as readiness proof.
Only allowed Markdown and JSON report files under the configured Jarvis reports directory are indexed.
Markdown detail is generated from safe metadata and sanitized summary text; JSON detail returns safe metadata only.
The report center does not browse arbitrary folders or read protected secret file contents.
